emotions.prompt: calm default expression, relaxed mouth, steady eye contact, neutral confident stance
bright genuine smile, sparkling eyes, cheerful open posture, small laugh energy
soft blush on cheeks, eyes glancing aside shyly, fingers fidgeting, embarrassed sweet smile
impatient annoyed expression, one eyebrow raised, arms crossed or hand on hip, pout or frown
vulnerable sad eyes, slightly downturned mouth, shoulders softer, melancholic but dignified
wide surprised eyes, small open mouth, startled cute pose, hands slightly raised
soft loving half-lidded gaze toward viewer, gentle blush, tender inviting smile, intimate but tasteful
playful wink or tongue-out grin, mischievous energy, dynamic teasing pose
